stemHtml: Per SERA, when an IFR pilot wants to change to VFR, what must they do?

options.a: Notify ATC; however, if IMC is encountered the flight must remain under IFR.
options.b: Request ATC approval; no weather conditions need to be met.
options.c: Request ATC approval; then fly above 3000 ft AMSL.
options.d: Notify ATC; however, if VMC prevails the flight must remain under IFR.
